working_on.task: Fix static generation issues on /_error, 404, 500 pages
working_on.notes: Downgraded React to 18.2.0 to match Next.js 14.2.0 internal version caching. Applied dynamic imports for recharts.

pending_tasks.task: Deploy to Dokploy via GitHub Actions & GHCR

recent_changes.description: Resolved Next.js 14.2.0 export error by downgrading React to 18.2.0 and adding explicit error files.

errors_encountered.error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'useRef')
errors_encountered.solution: Downgraded react and react-dom to 18.2.0 due to internal mismatch with Next.js 14.2.0

errors_encountered.error: Warning: Expected server HTML to contain a matching <g> in <svg> from Recharts
errors_encountered.solution: Wrapped all recharts components in next/dynamic with ssr: false

decisions_made.reason: Compatibility mismatch with Next.js 14.2.0 static generator
Next.js needs specific static fallbacks to avoid edge case build crashes
